calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs And Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Labor Code
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ADAMS AND ASSOCIATES, INC., WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS ADAMS AND ASSOCIATES OF NV, INC.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs And Attorneys Fees Pursuant To Labor Code is Granted in part. Respondent is awarded fees and costs of $6450 (reasonable fees of $6000 plus costs of $450). Appellant should not be required to pay the fees incurred for respondent's motion to continue which was for respondent's convenience. Appellant's opposition is essentially a request to vacate the order granting the motion to strike the appeal. However, that request requires a motion for reconsideration or a motion to vacate, which has not been filed. Order was e-mailed to the court and signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2011 Off Calendar
